content.en:
The Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is changing day by day, and after 10,000 years, the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is about to be promoted to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and anyone can see that the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm will be promoted to the Forbidden Realm.

And the promotion of Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm to the Forbidden Realm is a great opportunity for everyone.

Such a great opportunity will infinitely shorten the time for a half-step Domain Ancestor to be promoted to a Domain Ancestor, as long as the talent is good enough, it is not difficult to even step into the Domain Ancestor in one fell swoop.

Even for others, it is a big opportunity to be able to advance faster.

For example, it is not difficult for Dao Ancestors to break through from the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor to the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it is not difficult for the Invincible Dao Ancestors to be promoted to a half-step domain ancestor.

Of course.

The premise of everything is that it is a creature from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, even if it is not born from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, it must have cultivated for a long time from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm and has been recognized by the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, otherwise there is no way to obtain the great opportunity to be promoted from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

this day.

Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm has been promoted!!!

At this time, all the powerhouses of all the people had returned from all over the Dao Mountain Realm to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, all waiting for this opportunity.

Even Ye Tian was looking forward to this opportunity, because such an opportunity did not even exist in the Dark Sacred Domain.

The Dark Sanctuary is not a realm, but a dark forbidden realm, where there is no realm.

And the Forbidden Realm can only be born in the Realm, so the Dark Sanctuary has no such opportunity.

Of course, there are countless opportunities for the birth of the Dark Forbidden Realm beyond the Forbidden Realm, and people don't care about such opportunities.

Bang!!!!!

The Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm has transformed, and countless chaotic vitality has poured into the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm has continued to expand, evolving towards the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

And at this moment, the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm was manifested, and the endless forbidden Dao was displayed in the void, affecting the entire Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

They seem to be the birth and growth of the forbidden way, perfectly showing the evolution of the forbidden way, and the endless forbidden way rhyme spreads, making the Xuanxu to the ancient world present a special state.

In this special state, one by one, one by one, the half-step domain ancestors, one by one Dao ancestors, and even the true ancestors, they all closed their eyes and began to comprehend, and they all fell into epiphany.

Under this kind of enlightenment, they feel the root of the Tao, and if they follow the Forbidden Dao, they will make rapid progress, and they will also make great progress in the Dao and other methods.

As a result, everyone's strength is increasing rapidly.

Ye Tian also seized such an opportunity and began to comprehend the Holy Technique.

But soon, he found that the effect of contemplating the Holy Technique was not good, it was obvious that the grade of the Holy Technique was too high, and the opportunity for the birth of the Forbidden Dao had not yet had an effect on the Holy Technique.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only retreat to the second, comprehend the fusion of the forbidden path and the physical body, and strive to improve some cultivation at the level of the Unified Realm.

Originally, Ye Tian's physical body dao and forbidden dao were fused to less than one ten-thousandth of the extent.

But now, in the fortuitous epiphany of the birth of the forbidden world, the speed of enlightenment is too fast, so the problem of the integration of the physical path and the forbidden path has been understood one by one, and it has begun to merge rapidly.

2/10,000 degree of integration!

3/10,000 integration!

4/10,000 integration!

......

Ye Tian made rapid progress, and the others also improved very quickly.

Jinchen Dao Ancestor, Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and Thunder Tribulation Palace Master also participated in the fusion of the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao, they only thought about improving their cultivation and breaking through to the Domain Ancestor level as soon as possible, as for the improvement of the Forbidden Dao Technique, there was no hurry.

It's a big deal that after being promoted to Domain Ancestor in the future, they will slowly comprehend the Forbidden Dao Technique.

Meanwhile.

One Invincible Dao Ancestor was promoted to a Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

For example, Ye Tian's pair of children have stepped into the half-step domain ancestor level, and his wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu have also broken through to the half-step domain ancestor level.

None of them took the path of the pole because for them the path of the pole path was too difficult to walk and was not suitable for them.

However, Ye Tian chose a relatively easy holy body inheritance for them, and exchanged the corresponding holy body auxiliary cultivation thing from the battle gate, so there was no danger, but this holy body was not very powerful.

But if you can wander in the realm, having the Holy Body is enough to crush everything.

It was precisely because of the cultivation of the Holy Body that they did not break through to the half-step domain ancestor level, and now with the help of this opportunity, they also broke the shackles in one fell swoop and were promoted to the half-step domain ancestor.

Moreover, their accumulation was relatively strong, enough to rival the powerful ordinary half-step domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, and even not much weaker than some of the weaker Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors in the realm.

Black Wind Mountain's Flame Split Dao Ancestor, Wind Void Dao Ancestor, Stygian Sea Dao Ancestor, as well as several Ten Thousand Things Realm Palace Masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Ye Ye broke through to the Returning One Realm half-step Domain Ancestor level one by one.

The half-step domain ancestors of the Guiyi Realm were born one by one, what kind of prosperous age is this?

If it were in the past, I would hardly dare to imagine it!

Abrupt.

A Domain Ancestor's aura permeated, and a Returning One Realm half-step Domain Ancestor successfully broke through to the Domain Ancestor Realm.

This person was none other than Ling Tian Dao Ancestor.

Before, Ling Tian Dao Ancestor was already in the Perfection Realm of the Unified Realm, the Flesh Dao and the Forbidden Dao were infinitely close to ten percent of the fusion, and the Domain Ancestor had comprehended most of them.

Now, under the opportunity epiphany of the birth of the Forbidden Realm, he not only completely fused the Flesh Dao and the Forbidden Dao, but also understood all the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor, thus breaking the shackles in one fell swoop and being promoted to the Domain Ancestor.

Of course, he was just an ordinary domain ancestor, and his strength was still inferior to Ye Tian, so even if he broke through, he was very low-key and continued to comprehend.

Although the Lord of the Wind Mountain Mountain is also contemplating, what he is contemplating is the domain technique, and he is the domain ancestor himself, but this body is a clone, so there is no way to improve the cultivation realm, but if the domain technique breaks through, the strength exerted by this clone will naturally be even stronger.

At this time, another Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor broke through to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, it was none other than Ye Tian's good friend Ouyang Jiu'er.

On this day, the strength of the human race has also improved incomparably, a large number of true ancestors have been promoted to Dao ancestors, invincible Dao ancestors have been born one by one, and even a few invincible Dao ancestors who have accumulated enough have also impacted the half-step domain ancestor realm.

It's a pity that the opportunity epiphany in the forbidden world is not very long, and when the forbidden path is completely born and the rules are stable, the epiphany fate disappears.

One by one, the half-step domain ancestors, Dao ancestors, and true ancestors who were cultivating woke up from their epiphany and sighed one by one, because they lamented that the time for this epiphany was too short.

Especially the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, he was very sorry, because he almost broke through to become a domain ancestor.

Now, he has fused ninety percent of the flesh body Dao and the forbidden Dao, and if he is given some more time, he will definitely be able to complete ten percent of the fusion.

As for Ye Tian, the degree of fusion was not as good as that of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, because his Flesh Dao and Forbidden Dao were many times stronger than the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and the difficulty of fusion was naturally many times greater.

In terms of the improvement of strength, he far surpassed the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

Now, Ye Tian has fused sixty percent of the Flesh Dao and the Forbidden Dao, and his strength is much stronger than before, and now his conventional combat power is probably comparable to that of an ordinary Domain Ancestor, after exerting the power of the Extreme Dao after the Eternal Immortal Body, it is comparable to the not weak Elite Domain Ancestor, if he uses the Golden Silk Saint Technique again, I am afraid that he will be able to directly fight with the top elite Domain Ancestor, and it will be no different.
